split-subtitle.content: Our mission and values shape every product decision, every hire, and every partnership we pursue.

mission-heading.content: Make expert healthcare accessible to everyone, everywhere

mission-p1.content: We started Cura Health in 2019 after witnessing the gaps in rural healthcare delivery firsthand. Today, our telehealth platform connects 2.3 million patients across 48 states with board-certified specialists, with an average wait time of 11 minutes.

mission-p2.content: By 2027, we aim to expand into 15 additional countries and reduce diagnostic delays by 60% for underserved populations through AI-assisted triage and asynchronous consultations.

items.secondary: Every feature we build starts with the question: does this improve a patient's outcome or experience?
We publish our clinical outcomes, pricing, and error rates publicly. Trust is earned through openness.
Healthcare cannot wait for perfect data. We ship, measure, and iterate in weekly cycles.
Our platform supports 22 languages, screen readers, and low-bandwidth connections out of the box.
